messages.author: priya
messages.text: Publishing Stripe webhooks straight to Kafka still loses the event if the broker is down after we answer Stripe.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Lets persist the envelope in PostgreSQL first, then an outbox worker can publish it. One extra write is worth replayability.

messages.author: zoe
messages.text: That changes the worker boundary; are we committing consumer offsets only after projections succeed?
